description_long: This is a gold ring featuring a prominent central gemstone, likely a diamond or a similarly clear stone, set in a raised prong setting. The band is adorned with a row of small, round white stones embedded along the upper half, bordered by a line of gold beading for added texture and visual interest. On each side of the central stone, two additional round white stones are set into the band, creating a tiered, multi-stone effect. The gold band is thick and smoothly polished, giving the ring a substantial and luxurious appearance. The overall design is both elegant and ornate, with a geometric arrangement of stones and decorative gold accents. This piece would stand out as a statement accessory in any urban setting.
description: A gold ring with a large central gemstone, flanked by smaller white stones and gold beading, creating an ornate and elegant look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick gold band, the central gemstone, and the row of small white stones bordered by gold beading.
description_view_1: Front-angled view highlighting the raised central gemstone and the two side stones set into the band.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the band, central stone, and decorative beading.
description_view_3: Front-angled view similar to view 1, emphasizing the multi-stone arrangement and the ornate gold detailing.
